name: Veal Farsu Magru
recipeIngredient: 1/2 veal breast, one side only, partially defatted
1 lb beet greens or Swiss chard, cut into 1-inch ribbons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Have the butcher remove the bone from the veal breast and butterfly open it.
3. In a 12- to 14-inch saute pan, heat 2 tablespoons virgin olive oil until smoking and add beet greens. Cook until wilted but not fully cooked, about 1 minute, then remove from heat and allow to cool.
4. Add grated cheese, sundried tomatoes, and eggs, and season with salt and pepper to the cooled beet greens mixture.
5. Place the mixture inside the veal pocket and roll the veal up like a jellyroll. Tie securely with butcher twine and season with salt and pepper.
6. In an oven-ready thick-bottomed casserole, heat remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil until smoking.
7. Add the veal breast and brown on all sides, turning frequently, about 10 minutes. Drain oil from pan.
8. Add white wine and tomato sauce and bring to boil. Cover pan with lid or foil and place in oven.
9. Cook for 1-1/2 hours or until fork tender. Remove and allow to stand 10 minutes. Carve and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
